mapper.select:
WITH nbtable AS ( SELECT MONTH, period,
SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR = #{item} THEN FLOW ELSE 0 END) AS "${item}"
FROM (WITH DateRanges AS (
SELECT YEAR, MONTH, PERIOD, ROUND(AVG(FLOW), 3) AS FLOW FROM ( SELECT "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL".YEAR, MONTH, CASE WHEN DAY BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN '1上旬' WHEN DAY BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '2中旬' ELSE '3下旬' END AS PERIOD, FLOW FROM "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL" LEFT JOIN "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER" ON "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL".PARENT_ID = "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER".ID WHERE "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL".SITE_NAME = '头屯河进库' AND "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER".TABLE_NAME = '日平均流量表' AND "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL".YEAR BETWEEN 1989 AND 2023)T1 GROUP BY YEAR, MONTH,PERIOD
UNION ALL SELECT YEAR, MONTH, PERIOD, ROUND(AVG(FLOW), 3) AS FLOW FROM ( SELECT "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL".YEAR, MONTH, CASE WHEN DAY BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN '1上旬' WHEN DAY BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '2中旬' ELSE '3下旬' END AS period, FLOW FROM "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL" LEFT JOIN "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER" ON "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL".PARENT_ID = "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER".ID WHERE "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL".SITE_NAME = '楼庄子进库' AND "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER".TABLE_NAME = '楼庄子水库进库日均' AND "TTH"."SURFACE_WATER_FLOW_DETAIL".YEAR > 2023)T2 GROUP BY YEAR, MONTH,PERIOD
) SELECT YEAR, MONTH, period, SUM(FLOW) AS FLOW FROM DateRanges GROUP BY YEAR, MONTH, period ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH, period) tb GROUP BY MONTH, period ORDER BY MONTH, period ) SELECT * FROM nbtable UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS MONTH,'流量合计' AS period,
SUM("${item}") AS "${item}"
FROM nbtable UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS MONTH,'流量平均' AS period,
ROUND(AVG("${item}"), 3) AS "${item}"
FROM nbtable UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS MONTH,'水量合计' AS period,
ROUND(SUM("${item}")*8.64*365/10000,3) AS "${item}"
FROM nbtable UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS MONTH,'水量平均' AS period,
ROUND(AVG("${item}")*8.64*365/10000, 3) AS "${item}"
FROM nbtable
